how.title: From application to live in 3 steps
how.s1.title: Apply for a Licence
how.s1.desc: Fill in the short form below with your agency name, website, and expected monthly client volume.
how.s2.title: We Configure Your Brand
how.s2.desc: We apply your logo, brand colours, and custom domain. Turnaround is 2-3 business days.
how.s3.title: Launch to Your Clients
how.s3.desc: Share your branded URL with clients. They use the full VisaClear engine under your name.
features.title: What your licence gives you
features.f1.title: Your Logo, Your Colours
features.f1.desc: Full brand replacement. Your clients never see VisaClear or Vericore branding.
features.f2.title: Custom Domain
features.f2.desc: Deploy on your own domain, e.g. visas.youragency.com or tools.yourfirm.co.
features.f3.title: Agent Dashboard
features.f3.desc: Track all your clients, their checklist progress, and document status from one place.
features.f4.title: Unlimited Client Accounts
features.f4.desc: Add as many clients as you need. No per-seat charges for your end users.
features.f5.title: Built with GDPR & NDPA Principles
features.f5.desc: Built around data protection principles for UK, EU, and African applicants.
features.f6.title: All Pro Features Included
features.f6.desc: AI assistant, PDF exports, rejection analyser, passport photo checker, and reminders.
pricing.title: Straightforward monthly licences
pricing.subtitle: No setup fees. Cancel anytime. Billed monthly.
plans.starter.name: Starter
plans.starter.desc: Perfect for boutique agencies with up to 50 clients per month.
plans.agency.name: Agency
plans.agency.desc: For established agencies handling high volumes across multiple destinations.
plans.enterprise.name: Enterprise
plans.enterprise.desc: For banks, universities, and large organisations with custom requirements.
plans.enterprise.f2: Custom AI training on your country list
testimonials.title: What you get with a white-label licence
form.title: Apply for Your Licence
form.subtitle: We review every application personally. You will hear from us within 24 hours.
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your agency, the countries you focus on, or any special requirements...
form.privacy: Your information is kept strictly confidential and will only be used to process your licence application. We will never share your details with third parties. Handled in line with GDPR and NDPA principles.
form.error_required: Please fill in your agency name, email, and preferred plan.
form.success_toast: Application received. We will contact you within 24 hours.
form.error_toast: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
submitted.title: Application Received
submitted.body: Thank you. A member of the Vericore team will review your application and contact you at {{email}} within 24 hours.
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1.q: Do my clients know this is built on VisaClear?
faq.q1.a: No. On the Agency and Enterprise plans, all VisaClear and Vericore branding is removed. Your clients see only your brand.
faq.q2.q: How does the custom domain work?
faq.q2.a: You point a DNS record from your domain to our servers. We handle the SSL certificate and routing. Typical setup time is under an hour once your licence is active.
faq.q3.q: Can I add more destination countries?
faq.q3.a: Yes. Enterprise plans include custom country requests. Starter and Agency plans use the full 24+ destination library already built into VisaClear.
faq.q4.a: You can cancel at any time. Your branded instance stays live until the end of the billing period. No penalties.
faq.q5.a: We offer a 7-day free trial for the Agency plan. Apply using the form above and mention this in your message.
cta.title: Ready to upgrade your agency?
cta.subtitle: One agency at $149/month. Better than chasing 18 individual subscribers.
testimonials.t1.headline: Your brand, your clients
testimonials.t1.text: Your agency name, logo, and domain. Applicants see your product — VisaClear runs the infrastructure. Setup takes a few days, not months.
testimonials.t2.headline: One platform for your whole pipeline
testimonials.t2.text: Track leads, active cases, and approved clients in one dashboard. Share checklists, monitor progress, and communicate without switching tools.
